sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n61551" key="lagw/eios" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">λᾰγώειος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">α</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n61551.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">of</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">belonging to a hare</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0024.tlg001.perseus-grc1:1:491" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Opp.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">C.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.491</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0024.tlg001.perseus-grc1:519" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">519</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
